content:
- Followed task lifecycle for story-secure-explicit-node-config task 06 (full verification).
- Deep-skeptical-reviewed the existing plan (TO BE VERIFIED -> NOW EXECUTE) and amended it:
  - added preflight env/disk capture, explicit RUST_TEST_THREADS guard, reordered gates to run make lint before make test-long, and wrapped make test-long with external timeout to prevent indefinite hangs.
- Executed gates with evidence logs under .ralph/evidence/story-secure-explicit-node-config/06-task-full-verification-for-secure-explicit-config-refactor/:
  - make check: pass
  - make lint: pass
  - make test: pass
  - make test-long: pass
- Updated task 06 markdown to status done/passes true/passing true; ticked acceptance criteria; added execution_report pointing to evidence dir.
- Ran /bin/bash .ralph/task_switch.sh (updated current_tasks.md, appended task_history, removed current_task.txt).
- Committed and pushed:
  - task finished 06...: all gates green (forced-added ignored evidence logs via git add -f).
  - follow-up commit: recorded learnings in AGENTS.md (make test rejects RUST_TEST_THREADS=1; evidence dir is gitignored so use git add -f).
- Next: choose the next task via the usual .ralph/current_task workflow.
